message:
fix(vdbe,types): gate make_record_simd module to test-only and fix proptest format string

- vdbe/lib.rs: gate make_record_simd module with #[cfg(test)] so it
  only compiles in test builds — the production path already delegates
  to fsqlite-types, so this module was dead code in release builds
- types/record.rs: fix prop_assert_eq! format string from inline
  {values:?} to positional {:?}, values — the inline form doesn't work
  with the proptest macro expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
